name: DANA
mission: DANA helps downtown neighbors know what is changing, meet each other, and speak up for the place they call home.
paletteStatus: DANA green, crisp white, and a restrained gold accent.

membership.label: Live Downtown
membership.copy: For neighbors who want to meet people, get short notes, and help make downtown easier to live in.

membership.label: Building Membership
membership.copy: For buildings that want residents to know more people and feel more at home downtown.

membership.label: Sponsorship
membership.copy: For local partners who want to help downtown feel better for the people who live here.
